verses.1: To you, LORD, I lift up my soul.
verses.2: My God, I have trusted in you.
verses.3: Yes, no one who waits for you will be shamed.
verses.5: Guide me in your truth, and teach me,
verses.6: LORD, remember your tender mercies and your loving kindness,
verses.7: Don’t remember the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions.
verses.8: Good and upright is the LORD,
verses.9: He will guide the humble in justice.
verses.10: All the paths of the LORD are loving kindness and truth
verses.12: What man is he who fears the LORD?
verses.13: His soul will dwell at ease.
verses.14: The friendship of the LORD is with those who fear him.
verses.15: My eyes are ever on the LORD,
verses.16: Turn to me, and have mercy on me,
verses.17: The troubles of my heart are enlarged.
verses.18: Consider my affliction and my travail.
verses.19: Consider my enemies, for they are many.
verses.20: Oh keep my soul, and deliver me.
verses.21: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me,
